text:
- Update to 1.3.5
- Add new option: MYSQLCACHE for MySQL caching support
- Add LICENSE
- Install Brazilian Portugese language files to pt_BR instead of pt-br
- Sort PLIST
- Space/tab twiddle

Port maintainer (apache@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
